Name: Full-Time
description: Permanent full-time employment with the client.

Name: Contract
description: Fixed-duration contract engagement; not an offer of permanent employment.

Name: Contract-to-Hire
description: Initial contract engagement intended to convert to permanent employment after a defined period.

Name: Part-Time
description: Permanent employment at less than full-time hours.

Name: Per-Diem
description: Day-rate engagement, typically used for healthcare and trades. No guaranteed hours.
